properties.displayName: Azure SQL Database should restrict or disable Public network access
properties.description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. It enforces private-endpoint-only access for Azure SQL databases to remove public ingress paths and reduce exposure risks (see https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/azure-sql/database/connectivity-architecture).

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
